structural.detail: planner.py 仍含关键词路由残留
schema_planner 使用词法评分 fallback。词法评分 fallback，非真 planner model。 kind bias (safe+0.05, model.generate+0.12, restricted-0.10) 是结构性固定判断。
schema_planner._schema_only_default_plan 含固定 tool name: ['repo_memory.search', 'capability.match', 'web.search', 'model.generate']
executor.py 只执行 plan.tools，无用户意图推断

executor.py 含固定 tool dispatch table: ['time.now', 'time.date_math', 'weather.query', 'web.search', 'capability.match', 'repo_memory.search', 'catalog.search', 'skill_store.list', 'workflow_store.list', 'capability.status', 'model.generate']。新增 tool 需要手动加分支。

capability/registry.py match_capabilities 含固定中文关键词匹配: ['"代码", "编程", "bug", "报错", "开发"', '"推理", "分析", "判断", "策略"', '"仓", "项目", "mcp", "rag", "agent", "知识库"', '"视频", "生成视频", "comfyui"', '"网页", "抓取", "读取网页", "fetch", "url"']

renderer.py 含 intent 分支: [['time_now', 'date_math', 'weather', 'restricted_action', 'web_fact', 'project_architecture_services', 'project_architecture_capabilities', 'project_architecture_summary', 'capability_status', 'local_chat']], in_groups=[['"project_knowledge", "catalog_knowledge"']]
desktop router inferViewFromText() 含中文关键词路由
desktop router 含固定测试消息: ['你好，请用一句话介绍你自己', '今天是几月几号，现在几点', '我们现在有哪些 Agent 和 MCP 相关仓库资产', '你好，请用一句话介绍你自己']
model_gateway 含固定 PROFILE_MODEL_MAP
model_gateway 含固定 OLLAMA_URL
renderer.py 无硬编码状态列表
mac start_all.sh 含开发者绝对路径 fallback
bootstrap_runtime.ps1 含固定 profile→model 映射
windows-click-model-setup.js MODEL_CATALOG 含固定模型目录
hardcode_guard allowed_files 含 legacy_rule_planner.py，共 6 个允许文件
executor.py capability.status 含硬编码状态
validator.py 含 intent 分支: [['weather', 'web_fact']], in_groups=[['"project_knowledge", "catalog_knowledge"']]

planner_tool_schema.json 含 planner_hints: ['time.now', 'time.date_math', 'repo_memory.search', 'capability.match', 'web.search', 'weather.query', 'model.generate', 'filesystem.read', 'filesystem.write', 'shell.exec']

reason: schema_planner still uses lexical scoring fallback when planner model is disabled
planner_tool_schema contains fixed planner_hints and request_shapes as config
frontend still contains fixed demo buttons, test messages, and Chinese keyword view routing
capability/registry.py has hardcoded Chinese keyword scoring
renderer.py has intent-based branching coupled to planner intent names
executor.py has fixed tool dispatch table (new tools need manual branches)
executor.py capability.status returns hardcoded status list
model_gateway has fixed PROFILE_MODEL_MAP and OLLAMA_URL
service startup scripts contain fixed ports and dev fallback paths
validator.py has intent-based hallucination blocking coupled to planner intents
